title: USSD in 2026: Africa's silent infra layer
meta_description: USSD delivers 1.2 million transactions/hour in Africa — here’s how to plug it into your 2026 fintech stack for 94% loan completion rates on 2G networks
prewritten_tweet:
Most African fintechs ignore USSD because it feels old-fashioned.

But banks like KCB Kenya prove it handles 1.2M tx/hour with 99.95% uptime.
